caption:
Q1 2026 PH GDP growth: 2.8%.
Q1 2025: 5.4%.

That's the corruption tax. Now booked into the national accounts.

Sino ba talaga ang nagbabayad?

The system protected itself. The contractors kept their margins. 118 million Filipinos absorbed the slowdown.
news_hook: 2026-05-07 PSA Q1 2026 GDP release (2.8% YoY vs 5.4% in Q1 2025), with flood control corruption scandal cited across reporting as a primary drag on consumer/investor sentiment alongside oil shock and delayed 2026 budget rollout.
